name: WritersProof for Linear
tagline: Attest authorship of issues, specs, and project documents in Linear
description: WritersProof for Linear brings cryptographic authorship attestation to your project management workflow. Every issue description, comment, and project document you write in Linear is backed by tamper-evident proof of human authorship. WritersProof captures behavioral evidence during content creation without storing actual content — only SHA-256 hashes. Teams working in regulated environments or high-trust contexts can verify that specifications, requirements, and project documentation were genuinely composed by the attributed author.
features: Real-time evidence capture as you compose issues and comments in Linear
Per-issue attestation status visible in issue metadata
Project document authorship verification for specs and PRDs
Team-level attestation analytics and coverage reporting
OAuth 2.0 integration with Linear workspace permissions
Webhook-driven verification triggered on issue create and update events
Export attestation reports for compliance and audit workflows

requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
